title: Aterian Reports Fourth Quarter & Full Year 2024 Results
text: Full-year 2024 results showed net revenue of $99.0M, down from $142.6M in 2023. Enhanced gross margin of 62.1% compared to 49.3% in 2023. Significantly narrowed operating loss of $11.8M compared to $76.2M in 2023. The company achieved positive operating cash flow of $2.2M in 2024. The company reduced debt by more than $4.0 million and right-sized its inventory to focus on Aterian's most profitable products. The decision to rationalize SKUs and focus on the Company's six foundational brands generated material improvements in gross margin and contribution margin. Aterian provides 2025 guidance projecting revenue between $104-106M (5-7% growth) and expects to reach break-even Adjusted EBITDA.
